reviews.comment:
El 31-12-22 a las 17hs a 1400 kms d mi casa rumbo a llegar a conocer el límite con chile y volver a Calingasta dnd teníamos ospedaje. Se rompe el auto y cuando todos se preparaban para el festejo, mi marido y yo pensábamos recibir el año dentro del auto en la playa de la estación de servicio ACA en las Flores
De un momento de felicidad por el paseo, las vacaciones. se pasó a llanto, angustia, el no saber q hacer xq no conoces a nadie ni nada,  no sabes a dnd ir.
Pero se acercan Laura  y Miguel y sin ningún tipo de interés y sin conocernos nos brindaron la casa de su papá para pasar la noche y cenar y brindar.
No tengo o mejor dicho no existe la manera de agradecer a los chicos y su familia su acto de amor hacia 2 desconocidos.
Solo me resta decir GRACIAS GRACIAS GRACIAS por todo.
Y a todos los usuarios quiero q sepan que no solo tienen una estación de servicio para abastecerse, si no también siempre van a encontrar unas personas maravillosas q siempre van a buscar la forma de ayudarte. NO DUDEN EN PASAR. Eternamente agradecido 🙏 desde bs as.  Ale y Juan

(Translated by Google)
On December 31, 2022, at 5:00 PM, 1400 km from my home, on my way to see the border with Chile and return to Calingasta where we had lodging, the car broke down. While everyone was getting ready to celebrate, my husband and I were planning to ring in the New Year in the car at the ACA gas station in Las Flores. A moment of happiness for the trip, the vacation, turned to tears, anguish, and not knowing what to do because we didn't know anyone or anything, we didn't know where to go.

But Laura and Miguel approached us, and without any ulterior motive and without knowing us, they offered us their father's house to spend the night, have dinner, and celebrate.
I don't have, or rather, there is no way to thank the couple and their family for their act of love towards two strangers.
All I can say is THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU for everything. And to all our customers, I want you to know that you not only have a gas station to fill up, but you'll also always find wonderful people who will always look for ways to help you. DON'T HESITATE TO STOP BY. Eternally grateful 🙏 from Buenos Aires. Ale and Juan
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdi1fYUt3EAE
